## Privacy checklist (for new providers)

- [ ] No network calls
- [ ] No secrets/credentials read
- [ ] No raw URLs stored in output
- [ ] No command text stored in output
- [ ] Uses SafeSqlite for locked databases
- [ ] Gracefully handles missing data source
